name: Epidemic
ability: Evil players "are the Demon". Each night, an alive player chooses a player (if not already chosen): they become their alignment. [No Minions. 1 player is evil]
flavor: YUCK!! Why am I so slimy?! (v1.4)
firstNightReminder: Wake an alive evil player & show them the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* & Epidemic tokens. They choose a player. :reminder: Put them to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* token & a thumbs up or thumbs down.
otherNightReminder: Wake an alive player & show them the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* & Epidemic tokens. They choose a player. :reminder: Put them to sleep. Maybe wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* token & a thumbs up or thumbs down.

jinxes.reason: If the Epidemic is in play and the Lethargic is evil, the Lethargic may die.
